title: Simple, transparent pricing
subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

errors.priceNotAvailable: Pricing for your region isn't available yet. Please contact support.
errors.generic: Something went wrong starting checkout. Please try again.

free.name: Free
free.description: Get started with the basics. Perfect for testing the waters.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For growing creators ready to scale their business.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For established businesses that need everything.

switch.q: Can I switch plans at any time?
switch.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

trial.a: Better — there's a free forever plan. Build your entire platform on it with no credit card and no time limit, and upgrade only when you're ready to sell.

payments.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payments.a: All major credit and debit cards, processed by Stripe. Payments from your students go directly to your own Stripe account — we never hold your money.

limits.q: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
limits.a: We will notify you when you approach your limits. You can upgrade at any time to get more capacity without losing any data.

cta2.title: Ready to get started?
cta2.subtitle: Launch free today and grow with us as a founding creator.
cta2.trustNote: Free plan available. No credit card required.

comingSoon: Pricing for your region is coming soon
comingSoonNote: We're finalizing local pricing. Please check back shortly.
